form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr1) over 2200m at Alexandra Park beaten 80 m by Meant To Be (2:43.90) on March 20 at $3.40. Showed ability the race before when she won by a neck (Fr6) at Alexandra Park (2:03.10) beating Meant To Be in on March 13 at $3.90. Can be prominent from this draw.

form.formComment: Just keeps winning. Won by 12 m as favourite (Fr4) at Menangle (1:51.50) beating Jilliby Ballerini in G1 No NR on March 14 at $1.15. Two runs back raced just off the speed and boxed on; posted a big 11 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Melton (2:41.00) beating Lovemeto in G1 No NR on February 28 at $1.04 at the bell was 3rd-4.31. Remarkable mare who can dictate from this draw and add to her winning streak.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 18 m by Gus (1:55.60) on April 2 at $15.20. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 2200m at Alexandra Park, beaten 4 m by Meant To Be (2:43.90) on March 20 at $45.50. Ticking along well but this might test her.

form.formComment: Recent efforts have been impressive. Last start by 5.5 m as favourite (30m Fr1) at Terang (3:25.80) beating Meadow Valley Star in No NR on March 27 at $1.15. Has put together some good results in Australia this campaign so looks a strong top-three prospect.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.1 m finishing second behind Meant To Be at Alexandra Park over 2200m on March 20 at $8.10. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Gus at this track over 1609m on April 2 at $6.70. A must for exotic players.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.1 m as favourite (Fr7) at this track (1:55.60) beating Johnny Who in on April 2 at $2.20. Slashing win here last start and did land the big Group 1 double at Addington last November so he is a talent.
